publishers.title: ccdd-gate
publishers.description: The CCDD gate tooling knowledge - how the deterministic verification gate works and integrates.

publishers.title: CCDD (Complexity-Controlled Development)
publishers.description: Specs, workflow and findings of the CCDD methodology - deterministic gates R1-R9 for AI-implemented code.

publishers.title: game-protocol
publishers.description: An interaction protocol spec published in-source - its Pages serves the repo root, so the publisher lives inside the source tree.

publishers.title: KDD (Knowledge Driven Development)
publishers.description: A real pre-existing OKF bundle with 40 concepts about the KDD methodology - contracts, validators, project templates. Also aggregated at the root origin under the kdd scope.

publishers.title: llms-txt-skills (the standard itself)
publishers.description: The spec publishes its own knowledge - 6 concepts covering the standard, adoption ladder, trust model, executable skills and consumption paths - plus a custom validator skill. Signed freshness attestations included.

publishers.title: llmstxt-demo-site (Workers demo)
publishers.description: The original demo publisher on Cloudflare Workers - executable skills including a POST write skill (create_payment against a real D1 stock), plus origin memory. Consumed by the reference gateway's CI.

publishers.title: mauricioperera.github.io (root, multi-project)
publishers.description: Root origin aggregating two projects on one llms.txt - the llms-txt-skills standard's own skills plus the KDD knowledge bundle under the kdd scope. Directly consumable.

publishers.title: taskmd
publishers.description: Task management as markdown - the taskmd format and workflow published as searchable knowledge.
